name: trades-platform-fullstack
description: Full-stack Trades Platform with React frontend and Node.js backend

scripts.build: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm start" "cd frontend && npm start"
scripts.install-all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.heroku-postbuild: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && npm run build

author: Your Name
